title: Suricatoos — Sensor Scan Job
description: A scan job the cloud dispatches to a tenant's internal scanner sensor over the mTLS phone-home channel (ADR-0007). The cloud is authoritative: it assigns job_id/correlation_id/tenant server-side and gates targets to the tenant's authorized scope. targets are IP/CIDR LITERALS only (no hostname → no scan-time DNS rebinding).

correlation_id.description: end-to-end anchor: job → local gvmd task → sensor-report → central report → Score

tenant.description: = cert O; server-set and server-re-derived; the sensor re-checks (defense in depth)

targets.description: IPv4/IPv6 or CIDR literals; every entry must be within the tenant's authorized scope.
